summary: Implemented the 7 transcendence commands (top, pod, kit, industry-map, watch, gaps, rank) over the Algolia catalog and local mirror.
reason: Generator emitted TODO stubs for the novel features from research.json; each required hand-written logic (popularity ranking, Printify filtering, matched-set joins, taxonomy joins, saved-search diffs, facet pivots, percentile stats). top/pod/kit/industry-map are live-first via best-selling/printify Algolia; gaps/rank read the synced mirror.
validated_outcome: All 7 verified against real data; dogfood novel_features_check found 7/7; rank percentile and search pagination bugs fixed in code review.
